🚀 We’re Hiring | Machine Learning Engineer – Generative AI / NLP / AWS Bedrock

Experience: 4+ Years
Location: Remote
Shift: EST Overlap (6:30 PM – 2:30 AM IST)
Candidates must be based in India only.

We are looking for a Machine Learning Engineer with strong experience in Generative AI, NLP, and ML infrastructure to support the development of a multi-model AI platform on AWS.

Key Responsibilities

• Design and develop NLP pipelines for document processing, semantic search, and summarization
• Build and optimize ML training pipelines for NLP and Generative AI models
• Implement synthetic data generation and augmentation pipelines
• Manage ML experiments, model registry, and lifecycle using MLflow
• Deploy GPU-based ML workloads on Kubernetes / AWS EKS
• Work with Large Language Models (LLMs) and transformer-based architectures
• Build Generative AI workflows using AWS Bedrock
• Develop model serving and inference APIs for multi-model AI platforms
• Ensure monitoring, observability, and reproducibility of ML experiments

Required Skills

Machine Learning & NLP
• Strong experience with NLP and transformer-based models
• Hands-on experience with LLMs, embeddings, summarization, semantic search
• Experience with Generative AI workflows

MLOps
• Strong hands-on experience with MLflow
• Experiment tracking, model registry, and lifecycle management

Programming
• Strong proficiency in Python
• Experience with PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers

Please reach out to me at +919891234161 or Medhar@forcecraver.com to discuss further.
Follow Medha Rajan  more job updates.
